description_long: This is a small, single-engine airplane with a high-wing configuration and a fixed tricycle landing gear. The fuselage is primarily white with a bold orange tail and blue accent striping along the sides, giving it a modern and sporty appearance. The cockpit is forward-mounted and enclosed, featuring a clear canopy and side windows for visibility. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the tail section includes a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a nose wheel, all fixed and exposed. The overall design suggests a light utility or general aviation aircraft suitable for short-range flights.
description: A small, high-wing, single-engine airplane with a white fuselage, orange tail, blue accents, and fixed tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the nose-mounted propeller, forward cockpit, and high-mounted straight wings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the orange tail, blue accent stripe, and fixed main and nose landing gear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the conventional tail with vertical and horizontal stabilizers, and the full wingspan.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the cockpit windows, propeller, and the fixed landing gear configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and one nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with side windows, likely single or dual seat.
